## Bull case

UNH’s strongest long case is accelerating earnings supported by a broad uptrend. Revenue grew 13.842922476979936% [P3.revenue_yoy], while diluted EPS grew 27.411167512690348% [P3.eps_yoy], indicating operating leverage. Free cash flow of 16075000000 USD [P3.fcf_ttm] adds financial capacity, although the valuation ratio of 21.73 [P3.pe_ttm] requires that momentum to persist.

The price of 436.35 USD [P1.price] stands 1.0655844268263202 ATRs [P9.stretch_sma20_atr], 2.424549120275739 ATRs [P9.stretch_sma50_atr], and 7.348971877541222 ATRs [P9.stretch_sma200_atr] above its short-, medium-, and long-term averages. Momentum is firm without a detected climax [P9.climax], while limited exhaustion evidence [P9.exhaustion_tally] argues against assuming the advance is finished.

Confirmation requires a close above the annual high of 461.62 USD [P1.high_52w]. DATA GAP: precomputed ATR distance to that confirmation level; it is not a price target.

A 1.0655844268263202-ATR retreat [P9.stretch_sma20_atr] to 422.7035000000001 USD [P2.sma20] would weaken the setup. A 2.424549120275739-ATR retreat [P9.stretch_sma50_atr] to 405.2997999999999 USD [P2.sma50] would invalidate the trend-following thesis.

Historical outcomes provide directional support [P9.base_rate_table], but only 1 independent macro cycle [P9.base_rate_n_macro] prevents a calibrated probability claim [P9.base_rate_ci_note]. DATA GAP: next announced earnings date [P5.next_earnings].

KEY POINTS: • Earnings momentum and trend alignment support the long case. • The annual high confirms; the medium-term average invalidates. • Forward operating evidence remains the essential test.
